title: Governing Reflective Human-AI Collaboration: A Framework for Epistemic Scaffolding and Traceable Reasoning
summary:
Large language models have advanced rapidly, from pattern recognition to emerging forms of reasoning, yet they remain confined to linguistic simulation rather than grounded understanding. They can produce fluent outputs that resemble reflection, but lack temporal continuity, causal feedback, and anchoring in real-world interaction. This paper proposes a complementary approach in which reasoning is treated as a relational process distributed between human and model rather than an internal capability of either.
  Building on recent work on "System-2" learning, we relocate reflective reasoning to the interaction layer. Instead of engineering reasoning solely within models, we frame it as a cognitive protocol that can be structured, measured, and governed using existing systems. This perspective emphasizes collaborative intelligence, combining human judgment and contextual understanding with machine speed, memory, and associative capacity.
  We introduce "The Architect's Pen" as a practical method. Like an architect who thinks through drawing, the human uses the model as an external medium for structured reflection. By embedding phases of articulation, critique, and revision into human-AI interaction, the dialogue itself becomes a reasoning loop: human abstraction -> model articulation -> human reflection.
  This reframes the question from whether the model can think to whether the human-AI system can reason. The framework enables auditable reasoning traces and supports alignment with emerging governance standards, including the EU AI Act and ISO/IEC 42001. It provides a practical path toward more transparent, controllable, and accountable AI use without requiring new model architectures.

AI.tldr: 论文提出将推理从模型内部能力转移到人机交互层，通过"The Architect's Pen"方法构建人机协作的推理循环，实现透明可控的AI使用。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型虽能模拟推理但缺乏真正的理解力和现实世界锚定，仅停留在语言模拟层面而非具身认知。文章认为推理不应仅被视为模型内部能力，而应作为人机交互中的关系过程来重构。
AI.method: 提出"The Architect's Pen"方法，将人类使用AI进行结构化反思比作建筑师通过绘图思考。构建"人类抽象→模型表达→人类反思"的对话循环，将AI对话本身变成推理回路。
AI.result: 将问题从"模型能否思考"重构为"人机系统能否推理"，提供了可审计的推理痕迹，支持欧盟AI Act和ISO/IEC 42001等新兴治理标准的合规。
AI.conclusion: 通过在人机交互层重构推理过程，无需新型模型架构即可实现更透明、可控、可问责的AI使用，为协作智能提供了实践路径。

title: ADAPT: Benchmarking Commonsense Planning under Unspecified Affordance Constraints
summary: Intelligent embodied agents should not simply follow instructions, as real-world environments often involve unexpected conditions and exceptions. However, existing methods usually focus on directly executing instructions, without considering whether the target objects can actually be manipulated, meaning they fail to assess available affordances. To address this limitation, we introduce DynAfford, a benchmark that evaluates embodied agents in dynamic environments where object affordances may change over time and are not specified in the instruction. DynAfford requires agents to perceive object states, infer implicit preconditions, and adapt their actions accordingly. To enable this capability, we introduce ADAPT, a plug-and-play module that augments existing planners with explicit affordance reasoning. Experiments demonstrate that incorporating ADAPT significantly improves robustness and task success across both seen and unseen environments. We also show that a domain-adapted, LoRA-finetuned vision-language model used as the affordance inference backend outperforms a commercial LLM (GPT-4o), highlighting the importance of task-aligned affordance grounding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 DynAfford 基准和 ADAPT 模块，解决现有体感 agent 无法评估动态对象 affordance 的问题。DynAfford 评估在对象 affordance 随时间变化的动态环境中的 agent 能力。ADAPT 通过显式 affordance 推理增强现有 planner，实验表明其能显著提高任务成功率，且域自适应的微调 VLM 优于通用商业 LLM。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常直接执行指令，而不考虑目标对象是否可以被实际操纵，即未能评估可用的 affordance（功能可操作性）。真实世界环境涉及意外条件和异常，而现有方法缺乏对动态环境中对象状态变化的感知和推理能力。
AI.method: 提出 DynAfford benchmark，用于评估在动态环境中的体感 agent，其中对象 affordance 可能随时间变化且未在指令中指定。同时提出 ADAPT 模块，一个即插即用的模块，可将显式的 affordance 推理能力增强到现有的 planner 中。实验中使用了域自适应的 LoRA 微调视觉语言模型作为 affordance 推理后端。
AI.result: ADAPT 模块的加入显著提高了在未见环境中的鲁棒性和任务成功率。域自适应的 LoRA 微调 VLM 作为 affordance 推理后端表现优于商业 LLM（如 GPT-4o），突出了任务对齐的 affordance grounding 的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了体感 agent 需要感知对象状态、推断隐式前置条件并相应调整动作的能力。ADAPT 模块是一个有效的即插即用解决方案，可以显著提升现有 planner 在动态环境中的性能。域自适应的微调方法相比通用 LLM 更有利于精确的 affordance 推理。

title: Attention-Gated Convolutional Networks for Scanner-Agnostic Quality Assessment
summary: Motion artifacts present a significant challenge in structural MRI (sMRI), often compromising clinical diagnostics and large-scale automated analysis. While manual quality control (QC) remains the gold standard, it is increasingly unscalable for massive longitudinal studies. To address this, we propose a hybrid CNN-Attention framework designed for robust, site-invariant MRI quality assessment. Our architecture integrates a hierarchical 2D CNN encoder for local spatial feature extraction with a multi-head cross-attention mechanism to model global dependencies. This synergy enables the model to prioritize motion relevant artifact signatures, such as ringing and blurring, while dynamically filtering out site-specific intensity variations and background noise. The framework was trained end-to-end on the MR-ART dataset using a balanced cohort of 200 subjects. Performance was evaluated across two tiers: Seen Site Evaluation on a held-out MR-ART partition and Unseen Site Evaluation using 200 subjects from 17 heterogeneous sites in the ABIDE archive. On seen sites, the model achieved a scan-level accuracy of 0.9920 and an F1-score of 0.9919. Crucially, it maintained strong generalization across unseen ABIDE sites (Acc = 0.755) without any retraining or fine-tuning, demonstrating high resilience to domain shift. These results indicate that attention-based feature re-weighting successfully captures universal artifact descriptors, bridging the performance gap between diverse imaging environments and scanner manufacturers.

title: Dual-Axis Generative Reward Model Toward Semantic and Turn-taking Robustness in Interactive Spoken Dialogue Models
summary: Achieving seamless, human-like interaction remains a key challenge for full-duplex spoken dialogue models (SDMs). Reinforcement learning (RL) has substantially enhanced text- and vision-language models, while well-designed reward signals are crucial for the performance of RL. We consider RL a promising strategy to address the key challenge for SDMs. However, a fundamental barrier persists: prevailing automated metrics for assessing interaction quality rely on superficial proxies, such as behavioral statistics or timing-prediction accuracy, failing to provide reliable reward signals for RL. On the other hand, human evaluations, despite their richness, remain costly, inconsistent, and difficult to scale. We tackle this critical barrier by proposing a Dual-Axis Generative Reward Model, which is trained to understand complex interaction dynamics using a detailed taxonomy and an annotated dataset, produces a single score and, crucially, provides separate evaluations for semantic quality and interaction timing. Such dual outputs furnish precise diagnostic feedback for SDMs and deliver a dependable, instructive reward signal suitable for online reinforcement learning. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on interaction-quality assessment across a wide spectrum of datasets, spanning synthetic dialogues and complex real-world interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出双轴生成式奖励模型(Dual-Axis Generative Reward Model),用于解决全双工口语对话模型(SDM)中交互质量评估的问题。该模型使用详细分类法和标注数据集进行训练,可同时输出单一分数以及对语义质量和交互时间的独立评估,为强化学习提供可靠的奖励信号。

AI.result: 在涵盖合成对话和复杂真实世界交互的广泛数据集上,该模型在交互质量评估任务中达到了最先进的性能。

title: Learning Where to Embed: Noise-Aware Positional Embedding for Query Retrieval in Small-Object Detection
comment: Accepted to ACM ICMR 2026; 14 pages, 6 figures, and 4 tables
summary: Transformer-based detectors have advanced small-object detection, but they often remain inefficient and vulnerable to background-induced query noise, which motivates deep decoders to refine low-quality queries. We present HELP (Heatmap-guided Embedding Learning Paradigm), a noise-aware positional-semantic fusion framework that studies where to embed positional information by selectively preserving positional encodings in foreground-salient regions while suppressing background clutter. Within HELP, we introduce Heatmap-guided Positional Embedding (HPE) as the core embedding mechanism and visualize it with a heatbar for interpretable diagnosis and fine-tuning. HPE is integrated into both the encoder and decoder: it guides noise-suppressed feature encoding by injecting heatmap-aware positional encoding, and it enables high-quality query retrieval by filtering background-dominant embeddings via a gradient-based mask filter before decoding. To address feature sparsity in complex small targets, we integrate Linear-Snake Convolution to enrich retrieval-relevant representations. The gradient-based heatmap supervision is used during training only, incurring no additional gradient computation at inference. As a result, our design reduces decoder layers from eight to three and achieves a 59.4% parameter reduction (66.3M vs. 163M) while maintaining consistent accuracy gains under a reduced compute budget across benchmarks. Code Repository: https://github.com/yidimopozhibai/Noise-Suppressed-Query-Retrieval

AI.tldr: HELP是一个用于小目标检测的噪声感知位置语义融合框架，通过热图引导的位置嵌入(HPE)在前景区域保留位置信息、抑制背景噪声，并将HPE集成到编码器和解码器中实现高质量查询检索。该方法将解码器从8层减少到3层，参数减少59.4%，在降低计算预算下保持准确率。
AI.motivation: Transformer检测器虽然提升了小目标检测性能，但存在两个主要问题：1) 效率低下；2) 容易受到背景诱导的查询噪声影响。这促使研究者开发深度解码器来精炼低质量查询。
AI.method: 提出HELP（Heatmap-guided Embedding Learning Paradigm）噪声感知位置语义融合框架。核心包括：1) Heatmap-guided Positional Embedding (HPE) - 在前景显著区域保留位置编码，同时抑制背景杂乱；2) HPE集成到编码器和解码器：编码器中注入热图感知位置编码实现噪声抑制特征编码，解码器中通过梯度掩码滤波器过滤背景主导嵌入实现高质量查询检索；3) 集成Linear-Snake Convolution丰富复杂小目标的相关特征表示；4) 梯度热图监督仅用于训练，推理时无额外计算开销。
AI.result: 解码器层数从8层减少到3层，参数减少59.4%（66.3M vs 163M），在降低计算预算下保持一致的准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: HELP框架通过热图引导的位置嵌入和噪声抑制机制，有效解决了Transformer检测器在小目标检测中的效率和问题，在显著减少参数和计算量的同时维持了检测精度。

The application domain mismatch is absolute: the paper focuses on detecting small objects in images using heatmap-guided positional embeddings for query retrieval, while the research profile deals with extracting 3D human motion from 2D videos, cross-modal alignment (text-video-3D), and video generation models for motion synthesis. Even though both mention "transformers" or "positional embeddings," the tasks, objectives, and application areas are fundamentally different - object detection vs. human motion generation.

title: WavAlign: Enhancing Intelligence and Expressiveness in Spoken Dialogue Models via Adaptive Hybrid Post-Training
summary: End-to-end spoken dialogue models have garnered significant attention because they offer a higher potential ceiling in expressiveness and perceptual ability than cascaded systems. However, the intelligence and expressiveness of current open-source spoken dialogue models often remain below expectations. Motivated by the success of online reinforcement learning(RL) in other domains, one might attempt to directly apply preference optimization to spoken dialogue models, yet this transfer is non-trivial. We analyze these obstacles from the perspectives of reward modeling and rollout sampling, focusing on how sparse preference supervision interacts with dense speech generation under shared-parameter updates. Based on the analysis, we propose a modality-aware adaptive post-training recipe that makes RL practical for spoken dialogue: it constrains preference updates to the semantic channel and improves acoustic behavior via explicit anchoring, while dynamically regulating their mixture from rollout statistics to avoid unreliable preference gradients. We evaluate the method across multiple spoken dialogue benchmarks and representative architectures, and observe consistent improvements in semantic quality and speech expressiveness.

AI.tldr: 针对开源口语对话模型表达力不足的问题，提出将强化学习应用于口语对话的模态感知自适应后训练方案，通过约束语义通道偏好更新、显式锚定语音行为、动态调节混合比例来克服稀疏偏好监督与密集语音生成的冲突，实现语义质量和表达力的一致提升。
AI.motivation: 端到端口语对话模型具有更高的表达性和感知能力潜力，但当前开源模型的智能和表达力仍低于预期。其他领域在线强化学习(RL)成功，但将偏好优化直接应用于口语对话模型面临挑战。
AI.method: 分析来自奖励建模和 rollout 采样视角的障碍，重点关注稀疏偏好监督与共享参数更新下的密集语音生成的交互；提出模态感知自适应后训练方案：约束偏好更新至语义通道、通过显式锚定改善 acoustic behavior、从 rollout 统计数据动态调节混合比例。
AI.result: 在多个口语对话基准和代表性架构上观察到语义质量和语音表达力的一致改善。
AI.conclusion: 该方法使强化学习在口语对话系统中变得实用，通过约束语义通道的偏好更新、改善语音行为的显式锚定，以及动态调节混合比例来避免不可靠的偏好梯度，在多个基准和架构上实现了一致的语义质量和语音表现力提升。

relevance_reason: The paper is about spoken dialogue models and speech generation, completely unrelated to 3D human motion generation in computer graphics. Despite mentioning "cross-modal" aspects, this refers to semantic-acoustic modality alignment in speech, not video-to-3D-motion conversion or 3D human motion generation. The application domain is fundamentally different - one deals with conversational AI/speech synthesis while the research profile is about extracting 3D human motion from 2D videos for computer graphics.

title: Building Extraction from Remote Sensing Imagery under Hazy and Low-light Conditions: Benchmark and Baseline
summary: Building extraction from optical Remote Sensing (RS) imagery suffers from performance degradation under real-world hazy and low-light conditions. However, existing optical methods and benchmarks focus primarily on ideal clear-weather conditions. While SAR offers all-weather sensing, its side-looking geometry causes geometric distortions. To address these challenges, we introduce HaLoBuilding, the first optical benchmark specifically designed for building extraction under hazy and low-light conditions. By leveraging a same-scene multitemporal pairing strategy, we ensure pixel-level label alignment and high fidelity even under extreme degradation. Building upon this benchmark, we propose HaLoBuild-Net, a novel end-to-end framework for building extraction in adverse RS scenarios. At its core, we develop a Spatial-Frequency Focus Module (SFFM) to effectively mitigate meteorological interference on building features by coupling large receptive field attention with frequency-aware channel reweighting guided by stable low-frequency anchors. Additionally, a Global Multi-scale Guidance Module (GMGM) provides global semantic constraints to anchor building topologies, while a Mutual-Guided Fusion Module (MGFM) implements bidirectional semantic-spatial calibration to suppress shallow noise and sharpen weather-induced blurred boundaries. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HaLoBuild-Net significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods and conventional cascaded restoration-segmentation paradigms on the HaLoBuilding dataset, while maintaining robust generalization on WHU, INRIA, and LoveDA datasets. The source code and datasets are publicly available at: https://github.com/AeroVILab-AHU/HaLoBuilding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HaLoBuilding，首个针对雾霾和低光条件下的建筑物提取光学遥感基准数据集，并设计了HaLoBuild-Net端到端框架。该框架通过空间-频率聚焦模块(SFFM)、全局多尺度引导模块(GMGM)和互引导融合模块(MGFM)有效应对气象干扰，在性能和泛化能力上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有光学遥感建筑物提取方法主要集中在理想清晰天气条件下，而实际应用中常面临雾霾和低光等恶劣条件导致性能下降。SAR虽具全天候能力但存在几何畸变问题。因此需要专门针对恶劣条件的建筑物提取基准和有效方法。
AI.method: 1. 构建HaLoBuilding基准数据集，采用同场景多时相配对策略确保像素级标签对齐；2. 提出HaLoBuild-Net框架，包含三个核心模块：SFFM（空间-频率聚焦模块）结合大感受野注意力和频率感知通道重加权；GMGM（全局多尺度引导模块）提供全局语义约束；MGFM（互引导融合模块）实现双向语义-空间校准。
AI.result: HaLoBuild-Net在HaLoBuilding数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法和传统级联恢复-分割范式，同时在WHU、INRIA和LoveDA数据集上保持强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功构建了首个雾霾和低光条件下的建筑物提取基准数据集，并设计了有效的端到端提取框架。实验证明该方法能有效应对气象干扰，提高建筑物边界清晰度，具有良好的泛化性能。

relevance_reason: 该论文是关于遥感图像中的建筑物提取，与3D人体动作生成完全不同领域。论文应用场景是遥感影像处理(建筑分割)，而研究_profile是计算机图形学/3D人体动作生成。即使论文提到空间-频率聚焦、多尺度引导等模块，但用于处理雾霾和低光条件下的遥感图像分割，与视频到3D动作重建、跨模态对齐等研究目标几乎没有交集。应用领域完全不同。

title: Discovering Novel LLM Experts via Task-Capability Coevolution
summary: Frontier model developers aim to train models continually to possess emergent, diverse capabilities. To extend capabilities, the current pre-training and post-training paradigm requires manually starting training runs with static datasets or reward functions every time. Addressing this limitation, our work pursues the insight that open-endedness (via the coevolution of models and tasks) can discover models with increasingly novel skills in a single run. We introduce a new model development framework that extends coevolution to large language model (LLM) discovery, open-ended \textit{Assessment Coevolving with Diverse Capabilities} (AC/DC). AC/DC evolves both LLMs via model merging and natural language tasks via synthetic data generation. AC/DC discovers growing archives of LLMs that surpass the capabilities of larger LLMs while taking up less GPU memory. In particular, our LLM populations achieve a broader Coverage of expertise than other curated models or baselines on downstream benchmarks, without \textit{any} explicit benchmark optimization. Furthermore, AC/DC improves Coverage over time, continually innovates on tasks and models, and improves performance in multi-agent best-of-N selection. Our findings highlight the potential of coevolution as a means of discovering broader sets of capabilities from base LLMs. Overall, AC/DC brings us one step closer to a profoundly new paradigm of LLM development, where continual improvements to the diversity of model capabilities can be accelerated by leveraging existing models as stepping stones to increasingly powerful models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AC/DC框架，通过模型合并和任务合成数据生成的协同演化，实现大型语言模型的持续开放性发现。该方法在单一运行中不断产生新的LLM和任务，比更大的模型具有更广泛的专业覆盖能力，同时占用更少的GPU内存。
AI.motivation: 当前预训练和后训练范式需要手动启动训练runs，使用静态数据集或奖励函数，限制了能力的扩展
AI.method: 提出了AC/DC框架，结合模型合并（model merging）和合成数据生成，通过评估与多样化能力的协同演化，在单一运行中持续发现新的LLM和任务
AI.result: AC/DC发现的LLM群体在下游基准测试中比更大的LLM和经过精选的模型实现了更广泛的专业覆盖范围，且无需任何明确的基准优化；在多智能体best-of-N选择中也提升了性能
AI.conclusion: AC/DC通过模型合并和自然语言任务合成数据生成，实现了LLM的持续进化，能够发现更广泛的专业能力，为LLM开发提供了新的范式转变

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on LLM (Large Language Model) discovery and training methodology using model merging and synthesized data generation. It is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - this is about LLM research, not about extracting 3D human motion from 2D videos, video generation models, or cross-modal alignment between text-video-3D motion. There is no relevance to the research profile's pain points or methods.

title: Beyond Visual Cues: Semantic-Driven Token Filtering and Expert Routing for Anytime Person ReID
summary: Any-Time Person Re-identification (AT-ReID) necessitates the robust retrieval of target individuals under arbitrary conditions, encompassing both modality shifts (daytime and nighttime) and extensive clothing-change scenarios, ranging from short-term to long-term intervals. However, existing methods are highly relying on pure visual features, which are prone to change due to environmental and time factors, resulting in significantly performance deterioration under scenarios involving illumination caused modality shifts or cloth-change. In this paper, we propose Semantic-driven Token Filtering and Expert Routing (STFER), a novel framework that leverages the ability of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) to generate identity consistency text, which provides identity-discriminative features that are robust to both clothing variations and cross-modality shifts between RGB and IR. Specifically, we employ instructions to guide the LVLM in generating identity-intrinsic semantic text that captures biometric constants for the semantic model driven. The text token is further used for Semantic-driven Visual Token Filtering (SVTF), which enhances informative visual regions and suppresses redundant background noise. Meanwhile, the text token is also used for Semantic-driven Expert Routing (SER), which integrates the semantic text into expert routing, resulting in more robust multi-scenario gating. Extensive experiments on the Any-Time ReID dataset (AT-USTC) demonstrate that our model achieves state-of-the-art results. Moreover, the model trained on AT-USTC was evaluated across 5 widely-used ReID benchmarks demonstrating superior generalization capabilities with highly competitive results. Our code will be available soon.

AI.tldr: Any-Time Person Re-identification (AT-ReID) 方法STFER，利用大视觉语言模型生成身份一致性文本，通过语义驱动的视觉token过滤和专家路由来提升跨模态和换装场景下的身份识别鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度依赖纯视觉特征，容易因环境光照变化和衣物更换导致特征变化，在跨模态(RGB-IR)和换装场景下性能显著下降。
AI.method: 提出STFER框架：1)使用指令引导LVLM生成身份内在语义文本；2)语义驱动视觉token过滤(SVTF)增强信息区域抑制背景噪声；3)语义驱动专家路由(SER)整合语义文本进行多场景门控。
AI.result: 在AT-USTC数据集上达到SOTA，并在5个主流ReID基准上验证了优异的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入LVLM生成的语义文本辅助视觉识别，有效提升了跨模态和换装场景下的鲁棒性，为任意条件下的人员再识别提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: The paper is about Person Re-identification (ReID), which is a completely different application domain - it's a security/surveillance task for identifying people across camera views, NOT 3D human motion generation in computer graphics. While both papers use VLM/LVLM and token filtering concepts, they serve entirely different purposes: this paper uses semantic-driven token filtering for identity recognition, whereas the research profile needs 3D motion generation from 2D videos. The application domain mismatch is fundamental.

title: Hybrid Decision Making via Conformal VLM-generated Guidance
summary: Building on recent advances in AI, hybrid decision making (HDM) holds the promise of improving human decision quality and reducing cognitive load. We work in the context of learning to guide (LtG), a recently proposed HDM framework in which the human is always responsible for the final decision: rather than suggesting decisions, in LtG the AI supplies (textual) guidance useful for facilitating decision making. One limiting factor of existing approaches is that their guidance compounds information about all possible outcomes, and as a result it can be difficult to digest. We address this issue by introducing ConfGuide, a novel LtG approach that generates more succinct and targeted guidance. To this end, it employs conformal risk control to select a set of outcomes, ensuring a cap on the false negative rate. We demonstrate our approach on a real-world multi-label medical diagnosis task. Our empirical evaluation highlights the promise of ConfGuide.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConfGuide，一种针对学习指导(LtG)框架的新型方法，通过使用保形风险控制来选择更简洁、更有针对性的指导结果，从而降低假阴性率，并在多标签医学诊断任务中得到验证。
AI.motivation: 现有混合决策方法生成的指导信息涵盖了所有可能的结果，导致信息量过大难以消化，需要一种更简洁、更有针对性的指导方式。
AI.method: 引入ConfGuide方法，采用保形风险控制(conformal risk control)来选择一组结果，确保对假阴性率设置上限。
AI.result: 在真实世界的多标签医学诊断任务上验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ConfGuide在生成更简洁、更有针对性的指导方面展现出良好的前景。

relevance_reason: 该论文是关于医学诊断领域的混合决策方法，使用VLM生成诊断指导，与计算机图形学/3D人体动作生成完全无关。虽然都提到了VLM，但应用领域完全不同：一个是医学影像诊断，另一个是3D人体动作生成。论文未涉及视频到3D动作的转换、动作生成模型、特征提取或跨模态对齐等任何相关技术。

title: Beyond Independent Frames: Latent Attention Masked Autoencoders for Multi-View Echocardiography
comment: Accepted as a workshop paper at the ICLR 2026 Workshop on Foundation Models for Science
summary: Echocardiography is a widely used modality for cardiac assessment due to its non-invasive and cost-effective nature, but the sparse and heterogeneous spatiotemporal views of the heart pose distinct challenges. Existing masked autoencoder (MAE) approaches typically process images or short clips independently, failing to capture the inherent multi-view structure required for coherent cardiac representation. We introduce Latent Attention Masked Autoencoder (LAMAE), a foundation model architecture tailored to the multi-view nature of medical imaging. LAMAE augments the standard MAE with a latent attention module that enables information exchange across frames and views directly in latent space. This allows the model to aggregate variable-length sequences and distinct views, reconstructing a holistic representation of cardiac function from partial observations. We pretrain LAMAE on MIMIC-IV-ECHO, a large-scale, uncurated dataset reflecting real-world clinical variability. To the best of our knowledge, we present the first results for predicting ICD-10 codes from MIMIC-IV-ECHO videos. Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate that representations learned from adult data transfer effectively to pediatric cohorts despite substantial anatomical differences. These results provide evidence that incorporating structural priors, such as multi-view attention, yields significantly more robust and transferable representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LAMAE（潜在注意力掩码自编码器），一种专为医学影像多视图特性设计的基础模型，通过潜在注意力模块实现跨帧和跨视图的信息交换，在MIMIC-IV-ECHO数据集上预训练，可预测ICD-10编码，且从成人数据学到的表示可迁移到儿科队列。
AI.motivation: 现有掩码自编码器(MAE)方法独立处理图像或短片段，未能捕捉心脏多视图结构；超声心动图的稀疏异质时空视图对心脏评估构成独特挑战。
AI.method: LAMAE在标准MAE基础上添加潜在注意力模块，允许直接在潜在空间中进行跨帧和跨视图的信息交换，使模型能够聚合变长序列和不同视图，从部分观测重建整体心脏功能表示。
AI.result: 首次实现从MIMIC-IV-ECHO视频预测ICD-10编码；成人数据表示可有效迁移到儿科队列，尽管存在显著解剖差异，表明多视图注意力等结构先验 yields更稳健可迁移的表示。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合多视图注意力等结构先验，LAMAE能够学习到更robust和可迁移的心脏表示，为医学影像基础模型发展提供新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical echocardiography (cardiac/heart imaging) and ICD-10 code prediction, which is completely unrelated to 3D Human Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. Although the paper uses masked autoencoders and multi-view processing, the application domain is entirely different - it's medical imaging for heart assessment, not human body motion generation. The subject matter (cardiac function) is fundamentally different from human motion (body movement), making this paper irrelevant to the research profile despite superficial methodological similarities.

title: AI-Enabled Covert Channel Detection in RF Receiver Architectures
summary: Covert channels (CCs) in wireless chips pose a serious security threat, as they enable the exfiltration of sensitive information from the chip to an external attacker. In this work, we propose an AI-based defense mechanism deployed at the RF receiver, where the model directly monitors raw I/Q samples to detect, in real time, the presence of a CC embedded within an otherwise nominal signal. We first compact a state-of-the-art convolutional neural network (CNN), achieving an 80% reduction in parameters, which is an essential requirement for efficient edge deployment. When evaluated on the open-source hardware Trojan (HT)-based CC dataset, the compacted CNN attains an average accuracy of 90.28% for CC detection and 86.50% for identifying the underlying HT, with results averaged across SNR values above 1 dB. For practical communication scenarios where SNR > 20 dB, the model achieves over 97% accuracy for both tasks. These results correspond to a minimal performance degradation of less than 2% compared to the baseline model. The compacted CNN is further benchmarked against alternative classifiers, demonstrating an excellent accuracy-model size trade-off. Finally, we design a lightweight CNN hardware accelerator and demonstrate it on an FPGA, achieving very low resource utilization and an efficiency of 107 GOPs/W. Being the first AI hardware accelerator proposed specifically for CC detection, we compare it against state-of-the-art AI accelerators for RF signal classification tasks such as modulation recognition, showing superior performance.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于AI的无线芯片隐蔽信道实时检测方案，通过紧凑CNN模型在边缘设备上实现高效准确的CC检测，并设计专用FPGA硬件加速器达到107 GOPs/W能效。
AI.motivation: 无线芯片中的隐蔽信道(CC)构成严重安全威胁，可从芯片向外部攻击者泄露敏感信息。现有防御机制难以满足边缘设备的实时检测需求，需要开发高效、准确的AI检测方案。
AI.method: 采用模型压缩技术紧致化CNN，使用原始I/Q样本作为输入，在RF接收机端部署AI防御机制。在SNR > 1dB条件下评估性能，并在FPGA上设计轻量级CNN硬件加速器进行基准测试。
AI.result: 紧凑型CNN在CC检测方面达到90.28%平均准确率，硬件木马(HT)识别达到86.50%准确率（SNR > 1dB）；SNR > 20dB时两项任务均超过97%准确率。与基线模型相比性能下降不足2%。FPGA加速器实现107 GOPs/W能效，资源利用率极低。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出针对CC检测的AI硬件加速器，在FPGA上实现107 GOPs/W的高能效，与现有RF信号分类AI加速器相比具有卓越性能。轻量级CNN在保持高检测精度的同时实现了模型缩减，为边缘设备上的实时CC检测提供了可行方案。

relevance_reason: 该论文完全属于无线通信安全/硬件安全领域，与计算机图形学/3D人体动作生成研究领域无关。论文研究的是使用CNN检测RF接收机中的隐蔽信道和硬件木马，这与研究 profile 中的视频到3D动作生成、视觉语言模型、视频生成模型、跨模态对齐等技术及应用场景完全不同。两者在应用领域、方法论和研究目标上都没有任何交集。

title: How to Correctly Make Mistakes: A Framework for Constructing and Benchmarking Mistake Aware Egocentric Procedural Videos
summary: Reliable procedural monitoring in video requires exposure to naturally occurring human errors and the recoveries that follow. In egocentric recordings, mistakes are often partially occluded by hands and revealed through subtle object state changes, while existing procedural datasets provide limited and inconsistent mistake and correction traces. We present PIE-V (Psychologically Inspired Error injection for Videos), a framework for constructing and benchmarking mistake-aware egocentric procedural videos by augmenting clean keystep procedures with controlled, human-plausible deviations. PIE-V combines a psychology-informed error planner conditioned on procedure phase and semantic step load, a correction planner that models recovery behavior, an LLM writer that performs cascade-consistent rewrites, and an LLM judge that validates procedural coherence and repairs failures. For video segment edits, PIE-V synthesizes replacement clips with text-guided video generation and stitches them into the episode to preserve visual plausibility. Applied to 17 tasks and 50 Ego-Exo4D scenarios, PIE-V injects 102 mistakes and generates 27 recovery corrections. For benchmarking, we introduce a unified taxonomy and a human rubric with nine metrics that cover step-level and procedure-level quality, including plausibility, procedure logic with annotator confidence, state change coherence, and grounding between text and video. Using this protocol, we audit several existing resources and compare PIE-V against a freeform LLM generation baseline under the same criteria. Together, the framework and rubric support post-completion verification for egocentric procedural mistake detection and correction.

AI.tldr: PIE-V是一个用于构建错误感知的 Egocentric 程序视频的框架，通过心理学启发的错误规划器、纠正规划器、LLM编写器和LLM评判器的组合来生成可控的人类可信错误和恢复，并使用文本引导视频生成来合成替换片段。
AI.motivation: 可靠的视频程序监控需要暴露自然发生的人类错误和随后的恢复。在第一人称视频中，错误经常被手部分遮挡并通过微妙的对象状态变化揭示，而现有程序数据集提供的错误和纠正痕迹有限且不一致。
AI.method: 提出PIE-V（心理学启发的视频错误注入）框架，通过增强干净的关键步骤程序与受控的、人类可信的偏差来构建和基准测试错误感知的视频程序。PIE-V结合了：1）基于心理学并根据程序阶段和语义步骤负载调节的错误规划器；2）建模恢复行为的纠正规划器；3）执行级联一致性重写的LLM编写器；4）验证程序一致性并修复失败的LLM评判器。对于视频片段编辑，PIE-V使用文本引导的视频生成合成替换片段并将其拼接成剧集以保持视觉可信性。

AI.conclusion: 框架和评分规则共同支持第一人称程序错误检测和纠正的完成后验证。

title: Dr.~RTL: Autonomous Agentic RTL Optimization through Tool-Grounded Self-Improvement
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have sparked growing interest in automatic RTL optimization for better performance, power, and area (PPA). However, existing methods are still far from realistic RTL optimization. Their evaluation settings are often unrealistic: they are tested on manually degraded, small-scale RTL designs and rely on weak open-source tools. Their optimization methods are also limited, relying on coarse design-level feedback and simple pre-defined rewriting rules. To address these limitations, we present Dr. RTL, an agentic framework for RTL timing optimization in a realistic evaluation environment, with continual self-improvement through reusable optimization skills. We establish a realistic evaluation setting with more challenging RTL designs and an industrial EDA workflow. Within this setting, Dr. RTL performs closed-loop optimization through a multi-agent framework for critical-path analysis, parallel RTL rewriting, and tool-based evaluation. We further introduce group-relative skill learning, which compares parallel RTL rewrites and distills the optimization experience into an interpretable skill library. Currently, this library contains 47 pattern--strategy entries for cross-design reuse to improve PPA and accelerate convergence, and it can continue evolving over time. Evaluated on 20 real-world RTL designs, Dr. RTL achieves average WNS/TNS improvements of 21\%/17\% with a 6\% area reduction over the industry-leading commercial synthesis tool.

AI.tldr: Dr. RTL是一个基于大语言模型的RTL时序优化智能体框架，通过多智能体协作进行关键路径分析、并行RTL重写和工具评估，并在47个模式-策略条目的可重用技能库支持下，在20个真实RTL设计上实现了平均21%的WNS和17%的TNS提升，同时减少6%的面积。
AI.motivation: 现有RTL优化方法存在以下局限性：1) 评估环境不现实，使用手动降级的小规模RTL设计；2) 依赖弱开源工具；3) 优化方法受限，仅依赖粗粒度设计级反馈和简单预定义重写规则。
AI.method: 1) 建立更现实的评估环境，包含更具挑战性的RTL设计和工业级EDA流程；2) 通过多智能体框架进行闭环优化，包括关键路径分析、并行RTL重写和工具评估；3) 引入组相对技能学习，比较并行RTL重写并将优化经验提炼为可解释的技能库。
AI.result: 在20个真实RTL设计上，Dr. RTL相比行业领先的商用综合工具实现了平均21%的WNS提升、17%的TNS提升和6%的面积减少。
AI.conclusion: Dr. RTL框架通过智能体协作和持续自我改进机制，在现实的工业EDA环境中实现了显著优于现有商业工具的RTL时序优化效果，其技能库可不断演进以提升PPA和加速收敛。

title: The Possibility of Artificial Intelligence Becoming a Subject and the Alignment Problem
summary: Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) is increasingly being discussed not only as a tool, but also as a potential subject with personal and therefore moral status. In our opinion, the currently dominant alignment strategies, which focus on human control and containment of AI, therefore fall short. Building on Turing's analogy of "child machines", we are developing a vision of the possibility of autonomy-supporting parenting of AI, in which human control over a developing AGI is gradually reduced, allowing AI to become an independent, autonomous subject. Rather than viewing AGI, as is currently prevalent, as a dangerous creature that needs to be locked up and controlled, we should approach potential AGI with respect for a possible developing subject on the one hand, and with full confidence in our human capabilities on the other. Such a perspective opens up the possibility of cooperative coexistence and co-evolution between humans and AGIs. The relationship between humans and AGIs will thus have to be newly determined, which will change our self-image as humans. It will be crucial that humans not only claim control over potential AGIs, but also engage with AGIs through surprise, creativity, and other specifically human qualities, thereby offering them motivating incentives for cooperation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个关于人工智能通用智能(AGI)的新型伦理视角:将AGI视为可能需要"培养"的发展中主体,而不是需要控制和约束的危险存在。作者基于图灵的"儿童机器"类比,主张逐步减少对发展中的AGI的人类控制,使其成为独立的自治主体,实现人类与AGI的合作共存和共同进化。
AI.motivation: 当前主流的对齐策略侧重于人类对AI的控制和约束,作者认为这种方法忽视了AGI可能具有的个性及其道德地位。需要在AGI发展之前重新思考人类与AGI的关系定位。
AI.method: 基于图灵"儿童机器"的类比,发展出一种"支持自主的养育"愿景,逐步减少对发展中AGI的控制,允许其成为独立自治的主体。
AI.result: 提出应将AGI视为可能的发展中主体予以尊重,同时对人类能力保持信心,开辟人类与AGI合作共存和共同进化的可能性。这将改变人类自我认知。
AI.conclusion: 人类与AGI的关系需要重新定义。人类不应仅主张控制权,还应通过惊喜、创造力等特质为AGI提供合作动机,实现真正的协同共存。

title: Predicting Power-System Dynamic Trajectories with Foundation Models
summary: As power systems transition toward renewable-rich and inverter-dominated operations, accurate time-domain dynamic analysis becomes increasingly critical. Such analysis supports key operational tasks, including transient stability assessment, dynamic security analysis, contingency screening, and post-fault trajectory evaluation. In practice, these tasks may operate under several challenges, including unknown and time-varying system parameters, privacy constraints on data sharing, and the need for fast online inference. Existing learning-based approaches are typically trained for individual systems and therefore lack generalization across operating conditions and physical parameters. Hence, this paper proposes LArge Scale Small ODE (LASS)-ODE-Power, a learning framework for general-purpose time-domain prediction. The proposed approach leverages large-scale pretraining on more than 40 GB of DAE or ordinary differential-equation (ODE) trajectories to learn transferable representations. The resulting model supports trajectory prediction from short measurement prefixes across diverse dynamic regimes, including electromechanical and inverter-driven systems. Hence, the model can be directly used without data sharing in a zero-shot setting. In addition, the proposed architecture incorporates parallel and linearized computation to achieve fast inference. Moreover, to enhance task-specific performance in power systems, a specialized fine-tuning strategy is developed based on approximately 1 GB of heterogeneous power-system dynamic data. Extensive experiments over diverse power-system simulation scenarios demonstrate that LASS-ODE-Power consistently outperforms existing learning-based models in trajectory prediction accuracy with efficient inference.

AI.tldr: 提出LASS-ODE-Power框架，通过大规模预训练（40GB+ DAE/ODE轨迹）学习可迁移表示，实现跨不同动态 regime（机电系统和逆变器驱动系统）的零样本轨迹预测，并开发专用微调策略（1GB异构数据），在轨迹预测精度和推理效率上显著优于现有学习方法。
AI.motivation: 随着电力系统向可再生能源丰富和逆变器主导运行转型，准确时域动态分析变得日益关键，支持暂态稳定评估、动态安全分析、 contingency筛选和故障后轨迹评估等关键运行任务。现有学习方法的挑战包括：未知和时变系统参数、数据共享隐私约束、快速在线推理需求，以及缺乏跨运行条件和物理参数的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出LASS-ODE-Power学习框架，利用40GB以上DAE/ODE轨迹进行大规模预训练学习可迁移表示，并结合并行化和线性化计算加速推理；针对电力系统任务开发专用微调策略，使用约1GB异构电力系统动态数据进行微调。
AI.result: 实验表明LASS-ODE-Power在多样化的电力系统仿真场景中持续优于现有基于学习的模型，在轨迹预测精度和推理效率方面均表现出色。
AI.conclusion: LASS-ODE-Power通过大规模预训练和专门微调策略，实现了在多样化电力系统动态场景下的高精度轨迹预测，零样本部署无需数据共享，推理效率高，显著优于现有基于学习的模型。

title: OmniLight: One Model to Rule All Lighting Conditions
comment: CVPRW 2026; NTIRE 2026 Image Shadow Removal & Ambient Lighting Normalization Challenges (1st Perceptual Rank for White Lighting, 2nd Fidelity Rank & 4th Perceptual Rank for Color Lighting)
summary: Adverse lighting conditions, such as cast shadows and irregular illumination, pose significant challenges to computer vision systems by degrading visibility and color fidelity. Consequently, effective shadow removal and ALN are critical for restoring underlying image content, improving perceptual quality, and facilitating robust performance in downstream tasks. However, while achieving state-of-the-art results on specific benchmarks is a primary goal in image restoration challenges, real-world applications often demand robust models capable of handling diverse domains. To address this, we present a comprehensive study on lighting-related image restoration by exploring two contrasting strategies. We leverage a robust framework for ALN, DINOLight, as a specialized baseline to exploit the characteristics of each individual dataset, and extend it to OmniLight, a generalized alternative incorporating our proposed Wavelet Domain Mixture-of-Experts (WD-MoE) that is trained across all provided datasets. Through a comparative analysis of these two methods, we discuss the impact of data distribution on the performance of specialized and unified architectures in lighting-related image restoration. Notably, both approaches secured top-tier rankings across all three lighting-related tracks in the NTIRE 2026 Challenge, demonstrating their outstanding perceptual quality and generalization capabilities. Our codes are available at https://github.com/OBAKSA/Lighting-Restoration.

AI.tldr: 研究光照相关图像恢复任务，对比了专用架构(DINOLight)和统一架构(OmniLight with WD-MoE)，后者通过跨数据集训练实现良好泛化，在NTIRE 2026挑战赛中获顶级成绩
AI.motivation: 解决 adverse lighting conditions (cast shadows, irregular illumination) 带来的图像可见性和色彩保真度下降问题，提高图像恢复质量和下游任务的鲁棒性
AI.method: 1) DINOLight: 针对每个数据集的专用baseline; 2) OmniLight: 基于Wavelet Domain Mixture-of-Experts (WD-MoE)的统一架构，跨所有数据集训练
AI.result: 两种方法均在NTIRE 2026挑战赛的三个光照相关赛道上获得顶级排名，展示出优异的感知质量和泛化能力
AI.conclusion: 数据分布对专用和统一架构的性能有显著影响；统一架构通过跨数据集训练实现了良好的泛化能力

title: COEVO: Co-Evolutionary Framework for Joint Functional Correctness and PPA Optimization in LLM-Based RTL Generation
summary: LLM-based RTL code generation methods increasingly target both functional correctness and PPA quality, yet existing approaches universally decouple the two objectives, optimizing PPA only after correctness is fully achieved. Whether through sequential multi-agent pipelines, evolutionary search with binary correctness gates, or hierarchical reward dependencies, partially correct but architecturally promising candidates are systematically discarded. Moreover, existing methods reduce the multi-objective PPA space to a single scalar fitness, obscuring the trade-offs among area, delay, and power. To address these limitations, we propose COEVO, a co-evolutionary framework that unifies correctness and PPA optimization within a single evolutionary loop. COEVO formulates correctness as a continuous co-optimization dimension alongside area, delay, and power, enabled by an enhanced testbench that provides fine-grained scoring and detailed diagnostic feedback. An adaptive correctness gate with annealing allows PPA-promising but partially correct candidates to guide the search toward jointly optimal solutions. To preserve the full PPA trade-off structure, COEVO employs four-dimensional Pareto-based non-dominated sorting with configurable intra-level sorting, replacing scalar fitness without manual weight tuning. Evaluated on VerilogEval 2.0 and RTLLM 2.0, COEVO achieves 97.5\% and 94.5\% Pass@1 with GPT-5.4-mini, surpassing all agentic baselines across four LLM backbones, while attaining the best PPA on 43 out of 49 synthesizable RTLLM designs.

AI.tldr: COEVO是一个共进化框架，将LLM生成的RTL代码正确性和PPA优化统一在单一进化循环中，通过增强测试平台、适应性正确性门和Pareto非支配排序，在VerilogEval 2.0和RTLLM 2.0上分别达到97.5%和94.5%的Pass@1，并实现43/49个设计的最佳PPA。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM-based RTL代码生成方法将功能正确性和PPA（功耗、性能、面积）优化脱节处理，在完全实现正确性后才优化PPA。这导致部分正确但架构有潜力的候选方案被系统性地丢弃。此外，现有方法将多目标PPA空间简化为单一标量适应度，模糊了面积、延迟和功耗之间的权衡关系。
AI.method: 提出COEVO框架，将正确性作为与面积、延迟、功耗并列的连续共优化维度。核心创新包括：1) 提供细粒度评分和详细诊断反馈的增强测试平台；2) 带退火的适应性正确性门，允许PPA有潜力但部分正确的候选方案引导搜索；3) 采用四维Pareto非支配排序替代标量适应度，无需手动权重调优。
AI.result: 在VerilogEval 2.0和RTLLM 2.0数据集上评估，COEVO使用GPT-5.4-mini分别达到97.5%和94.5%的Pass@1得分，超越所有基于智能体的基线方法。同时在49个可综合的RTLLM设计中，有43个获得最佳PPA。
AI.conclusion: 通过将正确性作为连续共优化维度并保留完整的PPA权衡结构，COEVO能够在单一进化循环中同时实现高正确性和优秀PPA性能，为LLM驱动的硬件设计探索了新范式。

title: Towards Faster Language Model Inference Using Mixture-of-Experts Flow Matching
summary: Flow matching retains the generation quality of diffusion models while enabling substantially faster inference, making it a compelling paradigm for generative modeling. However, when applied to language modeling, it exhibits fundamental limitations in representing complex latent distributions with irregular geometries, such as anisotropy and multimodality. To address these challenges, we propose a mixture-of-experts flow matching (MoE-FM) framework, which captures complex global transport geometries in latent space by decomposing them into locally specialized vector fields. Building on MoE-FM, we develop a non-autoregressive (NAR) language modeling approach, named YAN, instantiated with both Transformer and Mamba architectures. Across multiple downstream tasks, YAN achieves generation quality on par with both autoregressive (AR) and diffusion-based NAR language models, while requiring as few as three sampling steps. This yields a $40\times$ speedup over AR baselines and up to a $10^3\times$ speedup over diffusion language models, demonstrating substantial efficiency advantages for language modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出混合专家流匹配(MoE-FM)框架解决流匹配在语言建模中的几何表示问题，并基于此开发非自回归模型YAN，实现高效语言生成
AI.motivation: 流匹配在语言建模中存在基础性局限，难以表示复杂几何形状的潜在分布（如各向异性和多模态）

AI.conclusion: MoE-FM有效解决了流匹配的几何表示问题，YAN在保持生成质量的同时实现了显著的计算效率提升

title: Boundary-Centric Active Learning for Temporal Action Segmentation
summary: Temporal action segmentation (TAS) demands dense temporal supervision, yet most of the annotation cost in untrimmed videos is spent identifying and refining action transitions, where segmentation errors concentrate and small temporal shifts disproportionately degrade segmental metrics. We introduce B-ACT, a clip-budgeted active learning framework that explicitly allocates supervision to these high-leverage boundary regions. B-ACT operates in a hierarchical two-stage loop: (i) it ranks and queries unlabeled videos using predictive uncertainty, and (ii) within each selected video, it detects candidate transitions from the current model predictions and selects the top-$K$ boundaries via a novel boundary score that fuses neighborhood uncertainty, class ambiguity, and temporal predictive dynamics. Importantly, our annotation protocol requests labels for only the boundary frames while still training on boundary-centered clips to exploit temporal context through the model's receptive field. Extensive experiments on GTEA, 50Salads, and Breakfast demonstrate that boundary-centric supervision delivers strong label efficiency and consistently surpasses representative TAS active learning baselines and prior state of the art under sparse budgets, with the largest gains on datasets where boundary placement dominates edit and overlap-based F1 scores.

AI.tldr: B-ACT是一个.clip-budgeted 主动学习框架，通过层级两阶段循环显式地将监督分配给高价值的边界区域，在GTEA、50Salads和Breakfast数据集上实现了在稀疏标注预算下超越现有最佳方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 时序动作分割（TAS）需要密集的时序监督，而标注成本主要集中在识别和 refinement 动作转换边界处，分割误差集中在这些区域，轻微的时序偏移会不成比例地降低分段指标的性能。
AI.method: B-ACT采用层级两阶段循环：(1)利用预测不确定性对未标注视频进行排序和查询；(2)在每个选中的视频中，从当前模型预测中检测候选转换点，并通过融合邻域不确定性、类别模糊性和时序预测动态的边界评分选取前K个边界。标注协议仅请求边界帧的标签，但利用模型的感受野在边界中心片段上进行训练以利用时序上下文。
AI.result: 边界中心监督在稀疏预算下提供了更强的标签效率，一致性地超越了代表性的TAS主动学习基线和先前的 state-of-the-art，在边界放置主导 edit 和 overlap-based F1 分数的数据集上提升最大。
AI.conclusion: B-ACT通过专注于高价值的边界区域（而非随机采样或完整标注）实现了高效的标注预算利用，在三个标准数据集上均超越了现有最佳方法。该方法的核心创新在于层级化的主动学习策略和边界评分机制，能够精准识别需要标注的关键帧，从而在稀疏标注预算下最大化模型性能。

title: VisPCO: Visual Token Pruning Configuration Optimization via Budget-Aware Pareto-Frontier Learning for Vision-Language Models
summary: Visual token pruning methods effectively mitigate the quadratic computational growth caused by processing high-resolution images and video frames in vision-language models (VLMs). However, existing approaches rely on predefined pruning configurations without determining whether they achieve computation-performance optimality. In this work, we introduce , a novel framework that formulates visual token pruning as a Pareto configuration optimization problem to automatically identify optimal configurations. Our approach employs continuous relaxation and straight-through estimators to enable gradient-based search, solved via the Augmented Lagrangian method. Extensive experiments across 8 visual benchmarks demonstrate that effectively approximates the empirical Pareto frontier obtained through grid search and generalizes well across various pruning methods and VLM architectures. Furthermore, through learnable kernel functions, we investigate layer-wise pruning patterns and reveal that multi-step progressive pruning captures VLMs' hierarchical compression structure, achieving superior accuracy-efficiency trade-offs compared to single-layer approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于视觉语言模型(VLM)中视觉token剪枝的Pareto配置优化框架，通过连续松弛和直通估计器实现基于梯度搜索，并利用 Augmented Lagrangian 方法求解。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉token剪枝方法依赖于预定义剪枝配置，未能确定是否达到计算-性能最优性，且处理高分辨率图像和视频帧时存在二次计算增长问题。
AI.method: 将视觉token剪枝形式化为Pareto配置优化问题，采用连续松弛和直通估计器启用基于梯度的搜索，通过Augmented Lagrangian方法求解，并利用可学习核函数研究逐层剪枝模式。
AI.result: 在8个视觉基准测试上的实验表明，该方法能有效逼近网格搜索获得的Pareto前沿，且在各种剪枝方法和VLM架构上泛化良好，多步渐进剪枝捕获了VLM的层次化压缩结构。
AI.conclusion: 成功识别了最优剪枝配置，证明了多步渐进剪枝对VLM层次化压缩结构的有效性，实现了优于单层方法的精度-效率权衡。

title: Unsupervised Skeleton-Based Action Segmentation via Hierarchical Spatiotemporal Vector Quantization
summary: We propose a novel hierarchical spatiotemporal vector quantization framework for unsupervised skeleton-based temporal action segmentation. We first introduce a hierarchical approach, which includes two consecutive levels of vector quantization. Specifically, the lower level associates skeletons with fine-grained subactions, while the higher level further aggregates subactions into action-level representations. Our hierarchical approach outperforms the non-hierarchical baseline, while primarily exploiting spatial cues by reconstructing input skeletons. Next, we extend our approach by leveraging both spatial and temporal information, yielding a hierarchical spatiotemporal vector quantization scheme. In particular, our hierarchical spatiotemporal approach performs multi-level clustering, while simultaneously recovering input skeletons and their corresponding timestamps. Lastly, extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks, including HuGaDB, LARa, and BABEL, demonstrate that our approach establishes a new state-of-the-art performance and reduces segment length bias in unsupervised skeleton-based temporal action segmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种层次化时空向量量化框架，用于无监督骨骼动作分割，通过两级向量量化处理子动作和动作级别表示，在多个数据集上达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督骨骼动作分割方法存在分段长度偏差问题，需要一种能同时利用空间和时间信息的层次化方法。
AI.method: 提出层次化时空向量量化框架，包含两级向量量化：低级将骨骼与细粒度子动作关联，高级将子动作聚合为动作级表示。同时利用空间和时间信息进行多层聚类，并恢复输入骨骼及其时间戳。
AI.result: 在HuGaDB、LRa和BABEL等多个基准数据集上取得新的最先进性能，层次化方法优于非层次化基线。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种新的层次化时空向量量化框架，在无监督骨骼动作分割任务上取得了最先进性能，有效减少了分段长度偏差。

title: Where are the Humans? A Scoping Review of Fairness in Multi-agent AI Systems
comment: In proceedings of European Conference on Information Systems (ECIS) 2026
summary: Rapid advances in Generative AI are giving rise to increasingly sophisticated Multi-Agent AI (MAAI) systems. While AI fairness has been extensively studied in traditional predictive scenarios, its examination in MAAI remains nascent and fragmented. This scoping review critically synthesizes existing research on fairness in MAAI systems. Through a qualitative content analysis of 23 selected studies, we identify five archetypal approaches. Our findings reveal that fairness in MAAI systems is often addressed superficially, lacks robust normative foundations, and frequently overlooks the complex dynamics introduced by agent autonomy and system-level interactions. We argue that fairness must be embedded structurally throughout the development lifecycle of MAAI, rather than appended as a post-hoc consideration. Meaningful evaluation requires explicit human oversight, normative clarity, and a precise articulation of fairness objectives and beneficiaries. This review provides a foundation for advancing fairness research in MAAI systems by highlighting critical gaps, exposing prevailing limitations, and suggesting pathways.

AI.tldr: 一篇关于多智能体人工智能系统中公平性的范围审查论文，通过对23项研究的定性内容分析，识别出五种典型方法，揭示了当前研究中的关键问题和改进方向。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI的快速发展使得多智能体人工智能系统日益复杂，虽然AI公平性在传统预测场景中已有广泛研究，但在多智能体系统中的研究仍处于起步阶段且分散。该研究旨在系统性地综合现有研究，填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用范围审查方法，对23项精选研究进行定性内容分析，识别出五种典型方法。

AI.conclusion: 公平性需要在多智能体人工智能系统的整个开发生命周期中结构性嵌入，而非作为事后考虑。有效评估需要明确的人类监督、规范清晰度以及对公平性目标和受益人的精确阐述。该综述为推进多智能体系统公平性研究提供了基础。

title: StreamCacheVGGT: Streaming Visual Geometry Transformers with Robust Scoring and Hybrid Cache Compression
summary: Reconstructing dense 3D geometry from continuous video streams requires stable inference under a constant memory budget. Existing $O(1)$ frameworks primarily rely on a ``pure eviction'' paradigm, which suffers from significant information destruction due to binary token deletion and evaluation noise from localized, single-layer scoring. To address these bottlenecks, we propose StreamCacheVGGT, a training-free framework that reimagines cache management through two synergistic modules: Cross-Layer Consistency-Enhanced Scoring (CLCES) and Hybrid Cache Compression (HCC). CLCES mitigates activation noise by tracking token importance trajectories across the Transformer hierarchy, employing order-statistical analysis to identify sustained geometric salience. Leveraging these robust scores, HCC transcends simple eviction by introducing a three-tier triage strategy that merges moderately important tokens into retained anchors via nearest-neighbor assignment on the key-vector manifold. This approach preserves essential geometric context that would otherwise be lost. Extensive evaluations on five benchmarks (7-Scenes, NRGBD, ETH3D, Bonn, and KITTI) demonstrate that StreamCacheVGGT sets a new state-of-the-art, delivering superior reconstruction accuracy and long-term stability while strictly adhering to constant-cost constraints.

AI.tldr: StreamCacheVGGT是一种无需训练的视频流密集3D重建框架，通过跨层一致性增强评分和混合缓存压缩两个模块，解决了现有O(1)框架中信息破坏和评估噪声的问题，在5个基准数据集上创下新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有O(1)框架主要依赖"纯驱逐"范式，存在两个瓶颈：1) 二元token删除导致严重信息破坏；2) 局部单层评分带来的评估噪声。
AI.method: 提出两个协同模块：1) 跨层一致性增强评分(CLCES)：通过跨Transformer层级追踪token重要性轨迹，使用顺序统计分析识别持续的几何显著性；2) 混合缓存压缩(HCC)：采用三层分类策略，通过键向量流形上的最近邻分配将中等重要token合并到保留的锚点中。
AI.result: 在5个基准数据集(7-Scenes、NRGBD、ETH3D、Bonn和KITTI)上的广泛评估表明，StreamCacheVGGT实现了卓越的重建精度和长期稳定性，同时严格遵守常数成本约束。
AI.conclusion: StreamCacheVGGT通过CLCES和HCC两个协同模块，在保持常数内存预算的同时，显著提升了连续视频流中密集3D几何重建的准确性和长期稳定性，在5个基准数据集上创下新的最先进水平。

relevance_reason: This paper (StreamCacheVGGT) is about video-based 3D scene reconstruction (VGGT - Visual Geometry from Video), which is fundamentally different from 3D human motion generation. The paper focuses on dense 3D reconstruction of static scenes from video streams using efficient cache and scoring mechanisms for geometry tokens. Key mismatch: (1) Application domain: This addresses scene-level geometry reconstruction (buildings, objects), NOT human body motion generation; (2) The "motion" mentioned refers to camera motion streaming, not human skeletal motion; (3) The paper deals with token pruning in transformer cache compression, unrelated to motion synthesis; (4) Target datasets (7-Scenes, ETH3D, KITTI) are for scene reconstruction benchmarks, not human motion datasets (HumanEva, AMASS). While both involve 3D reconstruction, the domain is entirely different (static scene geometry vs. dynamic human body poses).

title: OpenMobile: Building Open Mobile Agents with Task and Trajectory Synthesis
summary: Mobile agents powered by vision-language models have demonstrated impressive capabilities in automating mobile tasks, with recent leading models achieving a marked performance leap, e.g., nearly 70% success on AndroidWorld. However, these systems keep their training data closed and remain opaque about their task and trajectory synthesis recipes. We present OpenMobile, an open-source framework that synthesizes high-quality task instructions and agent trajectories, with two key components: (1) The first is a scalable task synthesis pipeline that constructs a global environment memory from exploration, then leverages it to generate diverse and grounded instructions. and (2) a policy-switching strategy for trajectory rollout. By alternating between learner and expert models, it captures essential error-recovery data often missing in standard imitation learning. Agents trained on our data achieve competitive results across three dynamic mobile agent benchmarks: notably, our fine-tuned Qwen2.5-VL and Qwen3-VL reach 51.7% and 64.7% on AndroidWorld, far surpassing existing open-data approaches. Furthermore, we conduct transparent analyses on the overlap between our synthetic instructions and benchmark test sets, and verify that performance gains stem from broad functionality coverage rather than benchmark overfitting. We release data and code at https://njucckevin.github.io/openmobile/ to bridge the data gap and facilitate broader mobile agent research.

AI.tldr: OpenMobile是一个开源框架，通过任务合成pipeline和策略切换轨迹rollout方法，为视觉语言模型移动智能体生成高质量训练数据。实验表明微调后的Qwen2.5-VL和Qwen3-VL在AndroidWorld上分别达到51.7%和64.7%的成功率。
AI.motivation: 当前基于视觉语言模型的移动智能体虽然性能优异（如AndroidWorld接近70%成功率），但其训练数据和任务合成方法封闭不透明。该研究旨在填补这一数据缺口，提出开源框架以促进更广泛的移动智能体研究。
AI.method: 提出OpenMobile框架，包含两个核心组件：1）可扩展的任务合成pipeline，从探索中构建全局环境记忆，进而生成多样化且有依据的指令；2）策略切换的轨迹rollout方法，在学习者和专家模型间交替执行，以捕获标准模仿学习中缺失的关键错误恢复数据。
AI.result: 基于该数据微调后的Qwen2.5-VL和Qwen3-VL在AndroidWorld上分别达到51.7%和64.7%的成功率，显著超越现有开源数据方法。同时通过透明分析验证性能提升源于广泛功能覆盖而非基准过拟合。
AI.conclusion: OpenMobile通过开源数据和代码弥合了移动智能体研究的数据差距，其策略切换方法能有效捕获错误恢复数据，为构建更鲁棒的移动智能体提供了新范式。

The application domain is completely different - this is about mobile robot/agent control, not 3D human motion generation from video. The VLM here is used for mobile device interaction, not for quality supervision in motion generation. The "trajectory" refers to mobile agent path planning, not 3D human motion synthesis.

title: TokenGS: Decoupling 3D Gaussian Prediction from Pixels with Learnable Tokens
summary: In this work, we revisit several key design choices of modern Transformer-based approaches for feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) prediction. We argue that the common practice of regressing Gaussian means as depths along camera rays is suboptimal, and instead propose to directly regress 3D mean coordinates using only a self-supervised rendering loss. This formulation allows us to move from the standard encoder-only design to an encoder-decoder architecture with learnable Gaussian tokens, thereby unbinding the number of predicted primitives from input image resolution and number of views. Our resulting method, TokenGS, demonstrates improved robustness to pose noise and multiview inconsistencies, while naturally supporting efficient test-time optimization in token space without degrading learned priors. TokenGS achieves state-of-the-art feed-forward reconstruction performance on both static and dynamic scenes, producing more regularized geometry and more balanced 3DGS distribution, while seamlessly recovering emergent scene attributes such as static-dynamic decomposition and scene flow.

AI.tldr: TokenGS是一种新型3DGS前馈重建方法，通过encoder-decoder架构和可学习高斯token直接回归3D坐标，突破传统深度回归和编码器-only的限制，实现SOTA性能并支持静态-动态分解等 emergent 功能。
AI.motivation: 重新审视现代基于Transformer的3D高斯溅射(3DGS)预测方法的设计选择。传统方法将高斯均值沿相机射线回归为深度，这种做法次优且限制了应用；同时标准编码器设计将预测图元数量与输入图像分辨率和视角数量绑定。
AI.method: 提出TokenGS方法：1)直接从3D空间回归高斯均值坐标，仅使用自监督渲染损失；2)从编码器-only架构转向带可学习高斯token的编码器-解码器架构；3)解绑预测图元数量与输入分辨率和视角数量的绑定关系。
AI.result: 在静态和动态场景上实现最先进的前馈重建性能，生成更正则化的几何和更均衡的3DGS分布；对姿态噪声和多视角不一致具有更强鲁棒性；自然支持token空间中的高效测试时优化；可无缝恢复静态-动态分解和场景流等 emergent scene attributes。
AI.conclusion: TokenGS通过创新的encoder-decoder架构和直接回归3D坐标的方式，成功解决了传统方法的局限性，在重建质量、鲁棒性和灵活性方面均优于现有前馈方法。

The methods (learnable Gaussian tokens, encoder-decoder for 3DGS) are unrelated to the research profile's focus on VLM-based quality supervision, video-to-3D motion generation, and cross-modal alignment.

title: HyperSpace: A Generalized Framework for Spatial Encoding in Hyperdimensional Representations
summary: Vector Symbolic Architectures (VSAs) provide a well-defined algebraic framework for compositional representations in hyperdimensional spaces. We introduce HyperSpace, an open-source framework that decomposes VSA systems into modular operators for encoding, binding, bundling, similarity, cleanup, and regression. Using HyperSpace, we analyze and benchmark two representative VSA backends: Holographic Reduced Representations (HRR) and Fourier Holographic Reduced Representations (FHRR). Although FHRR provides lower theoretical complexity for individual operations, HyperSpaces modularity reveals that similarity and cleanup dominate runtime in spatial domains. As a result, HRR and FHRR exhibit comparable end-to-end performance. Differences in memory footprint introduce additional deployment trade-offs where HRR requires approximately half the memory of FHRR vectors. By enabling modular, system-level evaluation, HyperSpace reveals practical trade-offs in VSA pipelines that are not apparent from theoretical or operator-level comparisons alone.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了HyperSpace框架，用于将VSA系统分解为模块化算子，并基于该框架对HRR和FHRR两种VSA后端进行了分析和基准测试。
AI.motivation: VSA系统在超维空间中进行组合表示，但缺乏模块化框架来系统评估实际部署中的性能和资源权衡。
AI.method: 引入开源框架HyperSpace，将VSA系统分解为编码、绑定、捆绑、相似性、清理和回归等模块化算子，使用该框架对HRR和FHRR两种后端进行基准测试。
AI.result: 尽管FHRR理论复杂度更低，但模块化分析表明相似性和清理操作在空间域中占主导地位，导致HRR和FHRR端到端性能相当。内存占用方面，HRR约为FHRR的一半。
AI.conclusion: HyperSpace通过模块化、系统级的评估揭示了VSA管道中实际部署的权衡，这些权衡在理论或算子级比较中并不明显。

title: SegWithU: Uncertainty as Perturbation Energy for Single-Forward-Pass Risk-Aware Medical Image Segmentation
summary:
Reliable uncertainty estimation is critical for medical image segmentation, where automated contours feed downstream quantification and clinical decision support. Many strong uncertainty methods require repeated inference, while efficient single-forward-pass alternatives often provide weaker failure ranking or rely on restrictive feature-space assumptions. We present $\textbf{SegWithU}$, a post-hoc framework that augments a frozen pretrained segmentation backbone with a lightweight uncertainty head. SegWithU taps intermediate backbone features and models uncertainty as perturbation energy in a compact probe space using rank-1 posterior probes. It produces two voxel-wise uncertainty maps: a calibration-oriented map for probability tempering and a ranking-oriented map for error detection and selective prediction. Across ACDC, BraTS2024, and LiTS, SegWithU is the strongest and most consistent single-forward-pass baseline, achieving AUROC/AURC of $0.9838/2.4885$, $0.9946/0.2660$, and $0.9925/0.8193$, respectively, while preserving segmentation quality. These results suggest that perturbation-based uncertainty modeling is an effective and practical route to reliability-aware medical segmentation.
  Source code is available at https://github.com/ProjectNeura/SegWithU.

AI.tldr: SegWithU是一种轻量级后处理框架，通过rank-1后验探针在紧凑probe空间中建模扰动能量，为医学图像分割提供两种uncertainty map（校准导向和排序导向），在三个数据集上实现SOTA的单次前向传递uncertainty估计性能。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割中可靠的uncertainty估计对下游量化和临床决策支持至关重要。现有许多强uncertainty方法需要重复推理，而高效的单次前向传递方法通常提供较弱的失败排序或依赖限制性的特征空间假设。
AI.method: 提出SegWithU框架：一个后处理框架，向冻结的预训练分割backbone添加轻量级uncertainty head。SegWithU利用中间backbone特征，将uncertainty建模为紧凑probe空间中基于扰动的能量，使用rank-1后验探针。
AI.result: 生成两个体素级uncertainty map：面向校准的概率调整map和面向排序的错误检测与选择性预测map。在ACDC、BraTS2024和LiTS数据集上，单次前向传递基线中表现最强且最一致，AUROC/AURC分别达到0.9838/2.4885、0.9946/0.2660和0.9925/0.8193。
AI.conclusion: 基于扰动的uncertainty建模是实现可靠感知医学分割的有效且实用途径。
